item.title: Eos
item.description: Eos is my third attempt at building my own operating system kernel to run on actual hardware. Previously for my operating systems course at university I had worked with a simplified architecture that only supported single level paging and was free of the backwards compatibility cruft inherent to x86_64. This page aims to describe the state of the actual work and my design plans for the future, and will be updated as I continue to work on the project.
